zh.Steeple, Lavington, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾拉維頓
zh.Offley St. Ledgers, Hertfordshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾奧福利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peter de la Mare於1294年2月2日出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾拉維頓時，他的父親Reynold de la Mare26歲，母親Isabel Giffard35歲。他於大約1313年與Joan Achard在英國英格蘭哈普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1349年8月16日在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Peter de la Mare于1294年2月2日出生在英国英格兰維爾爾拉維頓时，他的父亲Reynold de la Mare26岁，母亲Isabel Giffard35岁。他于大约1313年与Joan Achard在英国英格兰哈普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1349年8月16日在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Mare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Americo, Cesareo, Fernando, Ines, Javier, Jose, Marcos.  Portuguese Henrique.  Italian Antonio, Gino, Olindo, Silvio, Vito.  Dutch Andries.
Italian: topographic name for someone living by the sea, from mare ‘sea’.
English: variant of   Mear  .

variants.name: Marucci
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Antonio, Silvio, Angelo, Carmela, Domenic, Donato, Egidio, Guido, Licinio, Lorenzo, Luciano.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Maruccio, a pet form of Mare or Mari .

variants.name: Marelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Giuseppe, Angelo, Dante.
Italian:
patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Mare  .

variants.name: Mear
meanings: Mear, a field; also from mear or mearh, a horse
Anglo-Saxon: Mere, lake, pool, sea

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peter de la Mare was born on 2 February 1294, in Lavington, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Reynold de la Mare, was 26 and his mother, Isabel Giffard, was 35. He married Joan Achard about 1313, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 16 August 1349, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Peter de la Mare est né le 2 février 1294, à Lavington, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reynold de la Mare, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel Giffard, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Joan Achard environ 1313, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 16 août 1349, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Peter de la Mare am 2. Februar 1294 in Lavington, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reynold de la Mare 26 und seine Mutter Isabel Giffard 35. Er hat um 1313 in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Achard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. August 1349 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter de la Mare è nato il il 2 febbraio 1294 nel Lavington, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Reynold de la Mare, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Giffard, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Joan Achard circa 1313, nel Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 agosto 1349, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de la Mareが1294年2月2日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアラヴィントンで生まれた時，父Reynold de la Mareは26歳，母Isabel Giffardは35歳であった。約1313年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアでJoan Achardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1349年8月16日に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter de la Mare(이)가 1294년 2월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 래빙턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reynold de la Mare(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Giffard(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1313년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 Joan Achard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 8월 16일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.2 FEB 1294–16 AUG 1349: 2 de fevereiro de 1294–16 de agosto de 1349
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter de la Mare nasceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1294, em Lavington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reynold de la Mare, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Giffard, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Achard aproximadamente 1313, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 16 de agosto de 1349, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Peter de la Mare родился 2 февраля 1294 г. в местности лавингтон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Reynold de la Mare было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Giffard, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Achard около 1313 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 16 августа 1349 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.2 FEB 1294–16 AUG 1349: 2 de febrero de 1294–16 de agosto de 1349
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Peter de la Mare nació el 2 de febrero de 1294, en Lavington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reynold de la Mare, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel Giffard, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Joan Achard aproximadamente 1313, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de agosto de 1349, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
